creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Various Tcl/Tk ports -- including lang/tcl86 itself -- currently define the license themselves because it is not known to our license infrastructure.

Updating graphics/libimg I just had to add my own definition once again. It is fully permissive, but has certain unique government-related verbiage.


Please, add it to bsd.licenses.db.mk so the healing can begin. Thank you!
